transcript: Hi everyone, great to be here. I'm the Head of Crypto at Kalshi and here to present on the next chapter from app to platform. So Kalshi already has a differentiated product, you know, we have the deepest liquidity on the platform. We've had several industry firsts with regulating prediction markets, parlays, broker infrastructure. Um, but I'm here to talk about what's coming next. Since I joined Kalshi just a few months ago, we've increased our volume by eight-fold. Uh, now around six billion dollars a month. Open interest has been growing largely and politics is now the largest in terms of open interest out of all our categories. Um, and we hit the number one place in the App Store almost every week. So, most people think of Kalshi as a US-only offchain app. But I think the future of us is to become a global onchain and offchain platform. We've seen this platform play in crypto many times and it drives a wide range of distribution. Hyperliquid and PumpFun are primary examples. And now we have tokenization available for Kalshi markets on Solana via Jupiter and DFlow. The primary edge that any exchange has is moat... uh is liquidity as the primary moat. And Kalshi is the only prediction market in the world that has onchain, offchain, US and international all feeding into one big global liquidity pool. If we look at where the landscape is heading for prediction markets, it's clearly heading towards regulated exchanges as the primary model. No one is building offshore crypto prediction markets anymore. And the reason for that is you can only get these massive broker integrations with people such as Robinhood or PrizePicks through compliant exchanges. And so this is the liquidity moat and this is the model that we'll see going forward taking prediction markets into the real mainstream. Jupiter was the first to launch tokenized predictions powered by Kalshi. And it's available on their website today. Here's a slide you can see of being able to trade in a very crypto-native seamless manner. Um, self-custodially out of your wallet. And yesterday we were very proud to announce our partnership with Phantom, which is, you know, one of the largest crypto wallets in the world. We're right in their homepage, uh as a native integration. You get your favorite markets ranging from crypto to sports to politics and even culture markets such as the Time's Person of the Year. Um, they've also innovated on live chat. So now you can chat with your friends while trading prediction markets. We're really excited about tokenization not just to unlock these big partners like Phantom, but also to create a new thriving ecosystem of startups building on top of Kalshi. And we have two million dollars in grants available. I'm most excited about these verticalized frontends that target specific niche markets on Kalshi. For example, weather markets. We have some weather experts and meteorology experts building weather trading terminals for Kalshi's weather markets. And they go really deep into having the lowest latency, highest fidelity data streams, localized data feeds, um, and all you need to trade weather with the most edge possible. We have esports uh frontends like this one here. We have X like overlays as well with um Twitter bots and Chrome extensions. And we've seen people start building Telegram bots on top of Kalshi. To get Kalshi and prediction markets in every surface area possible. Political markets are also quite interesting in like a map-based format. And we've seen like people who have big distribution channels um also targeting their own audience and building their own verticalized frontends. And so tokenized trading is kind of just the start for Kalshi onchain. We have this huge liquidity layer and data pieces um that are used... they're able to be used freely by builders to build new onchain primitives. Ranging from vaults to perps um on prediction markets which give you leverage and use the oracle prices, to permissionless markets, lending collateralization of long-dated prediction market positions um that allow you to unlock idle capital, and even AI agents which make trading predictions much more uh accessible for the rest of the world. And so I think ultimately prediction markets, they have two pieces of core value propositions. One is the trading aspect where everyone is an expert on something and prediction markets allow you to trade on the knowledge that you're... you know the best. And uh that makes it a lot more accessible to people. And then secondly I think for the 90% of people who interact with prediction markets, they do so in a read-only manner. And we're excited to see prediction markets and Kalshi getting more and more embedded into the daily lives of people. Um, recently announcing an exclusive partnership with CNN and CNBC. So we're very excited to see this becoming integrated into our daily news cycles. Thank you very much.

Kalshi Tokenizes Prediction Markets Using Solana Blockchain | CoinMarketCap
Kalshi Tokenizes Prediction Markets Using Solana Blockchain

Table of Contents
Solana News
[CMC Crypto News](/academy/categories/cmc-crypto-news)# Kalshi Tokenizes Prediction Markets Using Solana Blockchain
[By Ayesha Aziz](/academy/author/ayesha-aziz)
2m
2d ago
The move deepens Kalshi's competition with Polymarket, which is native to the Polygon blockchain, as both platforms continue to surge in growth.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%27720%27%20height=%27405%27/%3e)![Kalshi Tokenizes Prediction Markets Using Solana Blockchain](https://academy-public.coinmarketcap.com/optimized-uploads/40b54146b0d147099f3df894997e679f.png)
#### Table of Contents
* [Solana News](#solana-news)
## Solana News
Kalshi has[tapped](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/12/01/kalshi-makes-move-to-court-crypto-traders-with-tokenized-betting-contracts.html)Solana to move its prediction markets on-chain and enable permissionless monetization of its global liquidity pool. The U.S.-based prediction market platform is launching tokenized versions of thousands of its betting markets in a bid to attract a crypto-native user base and secure liquidity.
The[move](https://x.com/solana/status/1995593959041892724)deepens Kalshi's competition with Polymarket, which is native to the Polygon blockchain, as both platforms continue to surge in growth. November represents the biggest month yet for both platforms, with Kalshi's spot volume climbing to $5.8 billion and Polymarket's rising to over $3.7 billion.
The emerging duopoly kicked into hyper-growth following a policy reversal at the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission, which had historically taken a cautious approach toward the largely academic world of event derivatives. Last week, the CFTC officially cleared the way for Polymarket to reenter the U.S. after initially banning the unregistered platform.
Kalshi now appears willing to go head-to-head with Polymarket in the on-chain economy. The firm is reportedly working with Solana-based protocols DFlow and Jupiter to help bridge its off-chain orderbook to Solana's liquidity and on new Kalshi Builder Codes.
The Builder Codes enable users to permissionlessly monetize applications on top of Kalshi's global liquidity pool. Trading terminals, weather sites, AI agents, and anything users want to build can now earn fees and rewards proportional to volume, according to Kalshi's announcement.
Support is already live, with decentralized finance protocols DFlow and Jupiter connecting Kalshi's off-chain order book to Solana liquidity. Kalshi's head of crypto, John Wang, stated the move is designed to tap deeper pools of capital as prediction-market activity accelerates.
Tokenization gives Kalshi access to billions of dollars of liquidity, lets developers build third-party front ends, and helps maintain competitive pricing, according to Wang's assessment. The platform uses tokenization to convert its event markets into blockchain-based assets tradable on cryptocurrency networks.
This is not the first time Kalshi has turned to Solana. In September, the startup launched a grant program to support builders, traders, and creators pushing the frontier of prediction markets on Solana and the Coinbase-incubated layer-2 Base.
According to Bernstein, Kalshi's distribution partner Robinhood accounted for about 57% of its October volume. Tokenizing its betting markets appears to be a major gamble for the platform given its reliance on traditional distribution channels.
Kalshi raised $1 billion last month at an $11 billion post-money valuation, on the heels of news that Polymarket was again in the market to raise capital at a valuation upwards of $12 billion. The competitive landscape between the two platforms continues to intensify as both pursue aggressive expansion stra

sources.title: DFlow Prediction Markets API: Tokenizing the Future with Kalshi
sources.snippet:
# DFlow Prediction Markets API: Tokenizing the Future with Kalshi
[]()[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=)[](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=)[]()
1 December 2025, byNitesh Nath
![DFlow Prediction Markets API: Tokenizing the Future with Kalshi](https://solana.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.tina.io%2F265c7c91-c3d8-435c-9425-fb16c34796b3%2Fbuilder%2Fdflow-prediction-markets-api-kalshi%2Fdflow-prediction-markets-api-kalshi.png&w=828&q=75)
**Today, we are releasing the**[**DFlow Prediction Markets API**](https://pond.dflow.net/concepts/prediction/prediction-markets)**, the first tokenization layer bringing Kalshi’s prediction markets to Solana.**
## **A New API for Prediction Markets on Solana**
[**DFlow**](http://dflow.net/)is the most powerful trading infrastructure on Solana, enabling applications to access the cutting edge of financial markets.
The DFlow Prediction Markets API gives builders a direct, programmatic way to access tokenized Kalshi markets on Solana, delivering the deepest liquidity, the broadest market coverage, and the full composability expected from onchain assets.
This is the first and only API to offer real tokenization of Kalshi prediction markets with 100% market coverage, native composability, and flexible redemptions of correct predictions in multiple stablecoins.
Prediction markets allow anyone to trade a belief against another trader, something that has not been possible at global scale - until now. Across countless use cases, prediction markets have proven to be one of the highest-fidelity mechanisms humans have for forecasting the future.
With this release, prediction markets become a first-class citizen in the Solana ecosystem.
## **Kalshi: Pioneering Prediction Markets**
Founded in 2018, Kalshi made history as the first federally regulated exchange for trading on event outcomes. In 2020, Kalshi received[approval](https://news.kalshi.com/p/kalshi-designation)from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) as a designated contract market, establishing Kalshi as the first regulated financial exchange dedicated to event contracts.
That oversight brought legitimacy and opened the door for institutional participants, leading to deeper liquidity and real utility.
Everything took place in a secure, regulated environment, proving that:
Legitimacy →Liquidity →Utility.
## **Why Tokenization Matters**
Tokens are the most important financial primitive that unlock new possibilities. By tokenizing prediction markets, DFlow enables:
* **Composability:**seamless interaction with all other onchain financial primitives.
* **Interoperability:**integration with the full universe of Solana liquidity.
* **Permissionless Innovation:**open experimentation for builders without gatekeepers.
* **Expanded Design Space:**a massively broadened creative canvas, limited only by imagination.
Once a prediction becomes an SPL token, it gains all the composability of Solana DeFi. It can be borrowed, lent, used as liquidity (LP’d), swapped, collateralized, automated, or integrated into entirely new trading architectures.
Tokenizing predictions is how the next chapter of finance gets built.
## **How DFlow Implements Tokenization**
To turn predictions into tokens, DFlow uses**Concurrent Liquidity Programs (CLPs)**, a new Solana-native framework built by DFlow that bridges offchain liquidity with onchain users. CLPs allow traders to write trade intents onchain and have those orders filled asynchronously by liquidity providers.
![](https://solana.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.tina.io%2F265c7c91-c3d8-435c-9425-fb16c34796b3%2Fbuilder%2Fdflow-prediction-markets-api-kalshi%2Fdflow-prediction-markets-api-kalshi.png&w=3840&q=75)
This architecture introduces a multi-transaction model for trading. CLPs enable on-demand minting of tokenized prediction positions at tight prices, directly on Solana.
CLPs also allow for high-frequency minting and burning of tokens, and per

# Kalshi goes crypto: Tokenized predictions are live on Solana
![Adventuring through the Canadian Rockies](https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,quality=80,format=auto,onerror=redirect/uploads/asset/file/456863e7-bbd8-4da9-b77b-4e4db98e25b3/image__111_.png)
Kalshi taps into billions of onchain liquidity through tokenized predictions with Jupiter and DFlow.
By[John Wang](https://news.kalshi.com/authors/7a7eac19-34a2-4822-a293-b714b57cc4c8)
Dec 1, 2025
Tokenized predictions powered by Kalshi are now live on[**@Solana**](https://x.com/solana), via**[@JupiterExchange](https://x.com/JupiterExchange)**and[**@DFlow**](https://x.com/DFlow). More than $2 million in builder grants are now open,[**@AxiomExchange**](https://x.com/AxiomExchange)is coming soon, and support for EVM chains is on the way. The rollout has begun and the ecosystem is expanding quickly.
Welcome to the "Powered by Kalshi" era.
[
> —#
> (#
> )
](https://twitter.com/Kalshi/status/1995585557930672473)
## **Why Tokenization?**
![](https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,quality=80,format=auto,onerror=redirect/uploads/asset/file/4824b01a-64fd-4f1b-a89b-86e61e35b239/G7G7ll8XYAMV6LY.jpeg)
Tokenization is the endgame. It is non-custodial, instant, and crypto native.
Under the hood of DFlow and Jupiter, a hybrid RFQ system atomically executes trades onchain powered by the deepest prediction market liquidity layer in the world.
This structure gives builders and traders a fast, transparent, and fully programmable way to interact with real world events.
## **Introducing Kalshi Builder Codes**
![](https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,quality=80,format=auto,onerror=redirect/uploads/asset/file/54374c66-8161-41ab-b41a-e117a0b669ef/Screenshot_2025-12-01_at_2.32.45_PM.png)
This also marks the launch of Kalshi Builder Codes, which enable anyone to permissionlessly monetize applications built on top of our global liquidity pool.
Builders can now earn fees and rewards that scale with volume across applications such as:
* pro trading terminals
* weather sites and climate dashboards
* AI agents
* analytics tools
* many more
Learn more and apply at:[**kalshi.com/builders**](https://kalshi.com/builders)
### More From Kalshi
No posts found

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a central, crystalline cube as the Semantic Anchor to represent the fusion of core concepts. The crystal's perfect clarity and structure symbolize the 'US regulatory clarity' and the stable, CFTC-regulated platform Kalshi provides. The two distinct streams flowing into it—one of digital light (onchain/DeFi) and one of liquid metal (offchain/institutional)—visualize the aggregation of disparate sources into a 'single global pool'. The diegetic text 'GLOBAL POOL' is integrated as a holographic label on the crystal, reinforcing this central theme in a high-tech, integrated manner.
visual_idea.description: A massive, perfectly clear crystal cube hovers in the center of a dark, abstract space. From the left, a swirling vortex of neon-purple and cyan light particles (representing onchain Solana liquidity) flows into the cube. From the right, a stream of liquid platinum (representing offchain institutional liquidity) pours into it. Inside the cube, these two distinct sources merge seamlessly into a calm, glowing, unified pool of golden light. Subtly projected onto one of the crystal's forward-facing facets is the glowing holographic text: 'GLOBAL POOL'. The background is a deep, out-of-focus server room, with faint bokeh lights providing a sense of depth and technological context.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A massive, perfectly clear crystal cube, monumental in scale, hovers majestically in the absolute center of a dark, abstract space. The composition is vertically oriented (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing the cube's towering presence with ample negative space above. From the left, a dynamic, swirling vortex of brilliant neon-purple and vibrant cyan light particles, representing onchain Solana liquidity, flows with intense energy directly into the crystalline structure. Simultaneously, from the right, a smooth, heavy stream of liquid platinum, embodying offchain institutional liquidity, gracefully pours into the cube. Inside the flawless crystal, these two distinct and powerful sources merge with breathtaking precision, transforming seamlessly into a serene, intensely glowing, unified pool of pure golden light. Subtly projected onto one of the crystal's forward-facing facets is a captivating, luminous holographic text that reads: 'GLOBAL POOL'. The distant background recedes into a deep, out-of-focus server room, its faint bokeh lights creating a profound sense of technological depth and futuristic context. The entire scene is rendered with intricate detail, showcasing the clarity and refractive qualities of the crystal, the fluid dynamics of the light particles and liquid platinum, and dramatic specular highlights across all surfaces. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering, volumetric light, cinematic lighting.

editorial.headline: Kalshi Tokenizes Regulated Prediction Markets on Solana Mainnet
editorial.standfirst: The CFTC-regulated exchange pivots to a hybrid platform model, aggregating institutional and DeFi liquidity into a single global pool. This move enables permissionless composability for compliant event contracts, effectively exporting US regulatory clarity to the blockchain ecosystem.
key_takeaways: Monthly spot volume has surged 8-fold to reach $6 billion, driven largely by political prediction markets.
Native integrations are live with **Phantom**, **Jupiter**, and **DFlow**, alongside exclusive media partnerships with **CNN** and **CNBC**.
A $2 million developer grant fund has been launched to incentivize vertical-specific frontends, such as weather and esports trading terminals.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
### The Hybrid Liquidity Thesis
**Kalshi** is dismantling the structural barrier between regulated US derivatives and the permissionless crypto economy. By launching tokenized markets on **Solana**, the firm is executing a high-conviction bet that the future of prediction markets lies in a hybrid model: a single global liquidity pool fed simultaneously by regulated US brokers and permissionless on-chain interfaces. This structure allows **Kalshi** to leverage its CFTC designation to secure integrations with compliance-focused partners like **Robinhood** and **PrizePicks**, while **Jupiter** and **Phantom** facilitate global, non-custodial access. For institutional investors, this solves the fragmentation issue, ensuring that liquidity is not siloed between offshore crypto venues and onshore regulated exchanges.

### Unbundling the Interface
The strategic shift from 'app' to 'platform' is designed to commoditize the user interface while monetizing the underlying liquidity. Through partnerships with **DFlow** and the introduction of 'Builder Codes,' **Kalshi** is encouraging the development of hyper-specialized trading terminals. Instead of a generic betting app, the market is poised to fracture into verticalized frontends—such as high-fidelity weather dashboards for insurers or esports terminals for gamers—all settling on the same order book. The launch of a $2 million grant program underscores this push to decentralize the frontend stack, mimicking the ecosystem growth mechanics that propelled protocols like **Hyperliquid**.

### Regulatory Compliance as a Primitive
While offshore competitors rely on regulatory arbitrage to bypass US laws, **Kalshi** is weaponizing its compliance status to secure mainstream distribution. The firm’s exclusive data partnerships with **CNN** and **CNBC** serve to embed prediction markets directly into the institutional news cycle, a distribution channel largely closed to unregulated entities. By tokenizing these compliant contracts, **Kalshi** creates a unique primitive: a DeFi asset that carries the legal certainty of a regulated futures contract. This empowers developers to build complex financial products—such as on-chain vaults, perpetuals, and lending markets backed by event outcomes—without inheriting the legal toxicity associated with unregulated prediction pools.
